mapper.sql: id, product_id, image_path, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into product_image (id, product_id, image_path, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

id,

mapper.update:
update product_image
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
image_path = #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update product_image set product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, image_path = #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
